headline: Micron revenue almost triples, tops estimates as demand for memory soars
summary: Micron's stock has soared this year while its tech peers have struggled, as the impact of rising memory costs ripples across the industry.

headline: Micron rides memory price spike into earnings with stock up 62%, drubbing its tech peers
summary: As generative AI models get more sophisticated, companies need more memory and faster memory, Micron CEO Sanjay Mehrotra said in January.
